Registry / Terms / pre-setting device

pre-setting device

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #02378 · 5 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 5 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102007OIML R 117-1:2007
#01587
T.p.3
device which permits the selection of the quantity to be measured and which automatically stops the flow of the liquid at the end of the measurement of the selected quantity. The pre-set quantity may be the volume, the mass or the related price to pay
pending
20102007OIML R 139:2007
#01997
T.1.9
device which permits the selection of the quantity to be measured and which automatically stops the flow of the gas at the end of the measurement of the selected quantity
pending
20102006OIML R 49-1:2006
#00420
2.1.10
device which permits the selection of the quantity to be measured and which automatically stops the flow of the water at the end of the measurement of the selected quantity
pending
20101998OIML R 81:1998
#01024
3.15
a device that permits the selection of the quantity to be measured and which automatically stops the flow of the liquid at the end of the measurement and delivery of the selected quantity
pending
202X2024OIML R049-1:2024
#02378
3.1.10
device that permits the selection of the quantity of water to be measured and which automatically stops the flow of water after the selected quantity has been measured
pending
